features: MULTIDIMENSIONAL CLEANING: Enjoy fresher breath with a multidimensional cleaning experience when you brush with the Colgate Twister Fresh Medium Manual Toothbrush.
REMOVES ODOUR-CAUSING BACTERIA: Our medium bristle toothbrush, with a tongue brush cleaner, is designed to remove odour-causing bacteria from your mouth for confident, fresh breath.
CLEANS MORE THAN TEETH: Our manual toothbrush and tongue cleaner clean your teeth, gums, tongue and cheeks for multidimensional cleaning and freshness.
MULTI-HEIGHT BRISTLES: With multi-height bristles, our toothbrush is designed to give you a deep clean by cleaning in between teeth and along your gumline.
DEEP CLEANING: By cleaning deep each time you brush your teeth, you can enjoy a great clean and fresh breath with our Twister toothbrush.
COLOURS VARY: The toothbrush you receive may be a different colour from the one shown.
description: Product Description The Colgate Twister Fresh Medium Manual Toothbrush is designed to remove odour-causing bacteria. The toothbrush with tongue cleaner cleans your teeth, gums, tongue and cheeks for fresher breath. With 25% recycled content. Directions Wet the toothbrush head, apply toothpaste, brush teeth thoroughly for at least two minutes, and rinse the toothbrush after use Safety Warning Can be dangerous for small children. Use only for oral hygiene. Change the toothbrush after 3 months or after illness.
